arts.ttl: How to watch Aston Villa vs Club Brugge: TV channel and live stream for Champions League game today
arts.sum: Unai Emery’s side are strong favourites to reach the quarter-finals after dramatic late win in Belgium

arts.ttl: Martin Keown hails Aston Villa ambition after transfer that 'got missed'
arts.sum: Aston Villa have been busy in the transfer market under Unai Emery to put them in good shape in the Champions League and Premier League despite some high-profile exits

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Club Brugge: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Aston Villa host Club Brugge in the Champions League round of 16 on Wednesday. Preview includes team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: How Morgan Rogers became a £100m Aston Villa star after getting 'lost' at Man City - and why scouts rave about a player they believe can be the new Yaya Toure or Jude Bellingham
arts.sum: TOM COLLOMOSSE: As he headed for the dressing room following Middlesbrough's 1-0 defeat by Aston Villa, Morgan Rogers started to suspect something was afoot.

arts.ttl: Road to the CL final: Inter face Bayern, Villa would play PSG in QFs
arts.sum: The Champions League round of 16 concludes this week with the quarter-final line-up now starting to take shape.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery sent Aston Villa transfer message amid unanimous Lucas Digne point
arts.sum: Aston Villa's new arrivals from the January transfer window have impressed, with big decisions to make in the summer on players like Marco Asensio and Marcus Rashford - but some fans in the Birmingham Live comments section say that an older face deserves to be in the conversation too as his contract ticks down. Digne has quietly been one of the club's most consistent players, but will enter the 2025/2026 season with one year left on his contract.

arts.ttl: Team News: Aston Villa vs. Club Brugge injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Champions League clash between Aston Villa and Club Brugge.

arts.ttl: Club Brugge manager makes 'pressure' point ahead of Aston Villa clash
arts.sum: Club Brugge manager Nick Hayen claims nobody is giving them a chance of overturning their two-goal deficit at Villa Park tomorrow night and progressing to the Champions League quarter-finals. Club Brugge manager Nicky Hayen and midfielder Ardon Jashari spoke to the media ahead of the Champions League round of 16 second leg with Aston Villa

arts.ttl: Villa handed triple-injury boost ahead of Brugge tie
arts.sum: Aston Villa were handed a major boost on Tuesday ahead of the second leg of their Champions League round of 16 tie against Club Brugge as coach Unai Emery said three key players would return to the squad.

arts.ttl: What £80m loss actually means for Aston Villa's PSR position and summer transfer plans
arts.sum: Back in January, football finance expert Swiss Ramble laid out predictions for who would be at potential risk of a PSR breach when looking ahead to the 2024/25 financial period, using calculations and estimations made on publicly available accounts at the time, revenue distribution that was known for the likes of the Champions League, as well as player trading sums. In the case of Villa, a pre-tax loss of more than £80m for the financial year was one of European football’s 10 largest, and that was despite the club set to post record-breaking revenues.
